description.ko: 단단한 흑요석 구조가 디지털 간섭 속에서 완벽한 기하학적 파편으로 부서지는 수학적 혼돈을 묘사한 작품입니다.
description.en: A depiction of mathematical chaos where a solid obsidian structure breaks into perfect geometric shards amidst digital interference.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian monolith by KURO-X, titled 'Recursive Fracture.' The structure is undergoing a violent yet mathematically perfect geometric deconstruction, shattering into a vortex of sharp #808080 and #C0C0C0 polygonal shards against a clinical #FFFFFF digital vacuum. Intense digital glitch artifacts, scanlines, and heavy chromatic aberration cut through the composition. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on shifting planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing precise mathematical chaos.
